title: Descriptor
description: Dynamic descriptor fields that appear on the customer's bank or credit card statement to identify the merchant and transaction.

name.description: Merchant name as it appears on the customer's statement. Maximum 22 characters total; name and phone combined must be 22 characters or less with an asterisk separator.

phone.description: Merchant phone number as it appears on the customer's statement. Must be 10–14 digits.

url.description: Merchant URL as it appears on the customer's statement. Maximum 13 characters.
